name: Zaro Coin (ZARO)
description: ZARO is the native token of ZaroVerse, a story-first entertainment universe. This is the BSC Wormhole-wrapped version of the Ethereum ERC-20 (0xc311FD6DA9686507F33991543d8158EF5FaDd5E7). Total supply: 1,000,000,000 ZARO on Ethereum. Only bridged tokens circulate on BSC. Full market cap reflects the Ethereum supply.
